summary: A LAN-based website for running on a local network
architectural_notes: Website designed for LAN deployment on local network

existing_features.title: Create a landing page that displays a welcome message confirming the site is running on the local network
Implement a simple navigation menu with sections for common LAN website features: Dashboard, Network Status, and Settings
Create a Dashboard page that displays basic network information placeholder sections

Add a creative, professional visual theme with a modern color scheme (avoid blue and purple) that conveys reliability and local network connectivity, with consistent typography and spacing throughout the application
Create a Files page accessible from the navigation menu with a file upload interface including drag-and-drop zone, file selection button, and upload progress indicator
Display a list of all uploaded files on the Files page showing filename, file size, upload date, and download button for each file
Add 'Files' navigation item to the Navigation component linking to the new Files page
Configure routing in App.tsx to include the Files page at /files route

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a LAN-based website that runs on local network
Create a backend method to accept file uploads, store file metadata (filename, size, upload timestamp, content type), and return a unique file identifier
Create a backend method to retrieve uploaded files by their unique identifier, returning both file data and metadata
Create a backend method to list all uploaded files with their metadata (filename, size, upload date, file ID)
